title: fimbristylis onchnidiocarpa
intro: Fimbristylis onchnidiocarpa, also known as the Black Needle Sedge, is a plant species that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. It is native to tropical regions and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant's health benefits include its ability to treat digestive issues, fever, and respiratory problems, making it a popular choice in traditional medicine. Fimbristylis onchnidiocarpa can be prepared as an herbal decoction or infusion, and its leaves and roots are often used in various herbal remedies.
